title: iria rara
intro: Iria rara, a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Iria rara is also known for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture by herbalists and traditional healers to harness its medicinal properties.
